name: Quick Spaghetti with Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large skillet with cooking spray. Place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add turkey and onion; cook until browned, stirring to crumble.
3. Drain well. Return to the skillet. Stir in water and Italian seasoning, salt, garlic powder, and tomato paste.
4. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes or until thickened, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve over spaghetti; sprinkle with cheese.
